name: gossifleur
flavor_texts: It anchors itself in the ground with its single leg, then basks in the sun. After absorbing enough sunlight, its petals spread as it blooms brilliantly.
It whirls around in the wind while singing a joyous song. This delightful display has charmed many into raising this Pokémon.
text: Gossifleur is the Flowering Pokémon. It is a grass-type Pokémon. Abilities: cotton-down, regenerator, effect-spore (hidden). Base stats — HP: 40, Attack: 40, Defense: 60, Sp. Atk: 40, Sp. Def: 60, Speed: 10. Evolution line: gossifleur → eldegoss. Lore: It anchors itself in the ground with its single leg, then basks in the sun. After absorbing enough sunlight, its petals spread as it blooms brilliantly. It whirls around in the wind while singing a joyous song. This delightful display has charmed many into raising this Pokémon.
